calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Reset To Sep-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekeron. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioners Damaris Yudith Solis Perez and Jesse Santa Maria Lopez were present in pro per with the minor, Brianna Daleyza Valdez Solis.
No Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing, but as there is no Proof of Publication, petitioners are instructed to return on Thursday, September 12, 2019 for further hearing.

Matter is CONTINUED to Thursday, September 12, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. for further hearing.
